title: Observability for Developers: What You Need to Know?

resources.title: OpenTelemetry docs
resources.evidence_quote: Obviously, I think in in an ideal world, I would love it for everyone to go to the hotel docs, as their, you know, one stop shop for all things hotel.

resources.title: O'Reilly video course on observability with OpenTelemetry
resources.evidence_quote: I do have an O'Reilly video course on observability with OpenTelemetry.

resources.title: OpenTelemetry Collector Builder docs
resources.evidence_quote: I was using this tool called the OpenTelemetry Collector Builder. And I went to the hotel docs for some guidance on it, and I got stuck.

resources.title: How to contribute to OpenTelemetry blog post
resources.evidence_quote: I have a blog post that I wrote on how to contribute to OpenTelemetry from my viewpoint as as someone who was in those shoes.

resources.title: Ted Young and Austin Parker book on OpenTelemetry
resources.evidence_quote: I think my my former colleagues, Ted Young and and, Austin Parker have a great book on OpenTelemetry as well.
